title: Savory Uruguayan Split Peas Roast
description: A hearty and flavorful Uruguayan dish featuring tender split peas and roast, perfect for meal prep. This sour and savory roast is a staple in Uruguayan cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large pot, saute the onion and garlic in olive oil until softened.
Add the split peas, carrots, potatoes, tomato paste, salt, and black pepper to the pot and stir to combine.
Place the beef roast on top of the vegetables and peas.
Cover the pot with a lid and transfer to the preheated oven.
Roast for 2 hours, or until the beef is tender and the peas are cooked.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Slice the beef against the grain and serve with the peas and vegetables.
Refrigerate or freeze for meal prep.
Reheat to an internal temperature of 165 degrees Fahrenheit before serving.
